channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Umar Hayat sentenced to additional two-year imprisonment in arms case linked to Sana Yousaf murder
item.description: ISLAMABAD: In a significant development in the high-profile Sana Yousaf murder case, Umar Hayat, already convicted for killing the teenage TikTok star, has been sentenced to an additional two years in...

item.title: Dismissed Karachi constable who helped arrest drug suspect Pinky may be reinstated
item.description: A police constable in Karachi, who was previously dismissed over allegations of accepting bribes from a suspected drug operator known as Anmol alias Pinky, may be reinstated following his reported rol...

item.title: Spencer Pratt, Reality TV Star, Announces Run for Los Angeles Mayor Amid Criticism
item.description: Spencer Pratt, best known for his role on MTV's reality show 'The Hills,' is running for mayor of Los Angeles, drawing sharp comparisons to former President Donald Trump. Pratt, who gained notoriety a...

item.title: Federal government declares three-day public holiday for Eidul Azha
item.description: The federal government of Pakistan has officially declared a three-day public holiday from May 26 to May 28, 2026, in observance of Eidul Azha. This announcement was made following the Ruet-i-Hilal Co...

item.title: Georgia GOP Shifts Toward Trump-Aligned Candidates in Key Primaries
item.description: Georgia's Republican Party has experienced a significant shift as Trump-aligned candidates dominated Tuesday's primaries, signaling a clear move away from the old guard. High-profile figures who oppos...

item.title: Erwin Tulfo: Minority Bloc Should Not Be Blamed for Senate Disruption
item.description: Broadcast journalist Erwin Tulfo has expressed that it is unfair and irresponsible to single out the minority bloc in relation to the recent chaotic events at the Philippine Senate. Tulfo emphasized t...

item.title: Pakistan and China Strengthen Cooperation on Regional and Global Issues
item.description: On Wednesday, Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar addressed the Senate, highlighting that Pakistan and China share a converging vision on regional and international matters. The occas...

item.title: Senate Rules Prevent Dela Rosa from Attending Sessions and Impeachment Remotely
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa is currently barred from participating in Senate plenary sessions and the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte via teleconferencing, based on exi...

item.title: A Glimpse Into the Golden Age of Photography Through Vintage Portraits
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of forty vintage photographs capturing people proudly holding their cameras, spanning the 1920s to the 1950s. The images feature a wide array of cameras, fro...

item.title: US allows Pakistan temporary access to Russian crude amid energy concerns
item.description: Pakistan may benefit from a new temporary licence issued by the United States Department of the Treasury, allowing certain energy-importing countries to access Russian oil. The licence is for 30 days ...

item.title: New Computer Science Graduates Enter Job Market Amid Rising AI Challenges
item.description: As computer science students like Audrey Hasson graduate in 2026, they are entering a job market heavily influenced by rapid advances in artificial intelligence. Many experts warn that AI could make s...

item.title: Atiku draws lessons from Arsenal’s Premier League triumph for Nigeria
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don advise Nigerians make dem take inspiration from Arsenal Football Club wey win their first Premier League title in 22 years. Arsenal clinch the title after Manc...

item.title: YouTube launches AI-powered conversational search and integrates Gemini Omni into Shorts
item.description: Google is expanding the role of artificial intelligence on YouTube with the introduction of 'Ask YouTube,' a conversational search tool designed to handle complex queries and follow-ups. The feature a...

item.title: Matatu Strike Continues as Talks Over Fuel Prices Fail
item.description: Nairobi — Matatu operators in Kenya are keeping their vehicles off the roads as negotiations with the government over soaring fuel prices hit a deadlock. A high-level meeting on Monday night between E...

item.title: Early Wildfires Threaten Homes and Endangered Forests in California
item.description: California is experiencing an unusually active wildfire season earlier than usual, fueled by high winds, heat, and a dry winter. The Santa Rosa Island Fire, sparked by a sailor's distress flares in Ch...

item.title: Government Notifies Standards for Higher Ethanol-Petrol Blends up to E30
item.description: The Government of India has officially notified new standards for higher ethanol-petrol blends, specifically E22, E25, E27, and E30, allowing ethanol content in petrol to exceed the current 20% level....

item.title: Sean Duffy Defends Sponsored Road Trip Series Amid Ethical Concerns
item.description: Sean Duffy, the U.S. Transportation Secretary, has defended a forthcoming YouTube series called 'The Great American Road Trip', which he and his family filmed in celebration of America's 250th birthda...

item.title: Trump Endorses Paxton, Raising GOP Concerns Over Senate Control
item.description: Republicans are expressing concern that former President Donald Trump's recent endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton could jeopardize their control of the Senate in the upcoming 2026 midter...

item.title: DA Files Criminal Complaint Over CETA Administrator's Excessive Salary
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has lodged criminal charges against Oupa Nkoane, an administrator at the Construction Education and Training Authority (CETA), over the approval of his own annual salary o...

item.title: Putin and Xi meet in Beijing to strengthen Russia-China relations and discuss global issues
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin met Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing for a high-level summit, following a recent visit by US President Donald Trump. The meeting, described by officials as a priva...
